aiTexts: This Homlly Nordic Textured Cement Terracotta Tea Light Candle Mushroom Holder adds a warm, inviting glow and organic beauty to any space.
Made from natural, colorful cement with a unique textured surface inspired by the moon’s craters and delicate moss, it offers depth and character.
Multi-functional design lets you use it with a tealight candle or fill with candle wax, or as a storage spot for keys, jewelry, or diffuser lava rocks.
Durable and practical, perfect for home, office, weddings, and special events.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc: Perfect for illuminating your desk, table, or shelf to provide a warm, inviting glow but also serve as a striking centerpiece that captures the essence of organic beauty. Made from natural, colorful cement, showcasing a unique texture that adds depth and character to each mushroom-like shape. Get yours today!
product.highlights:
• Perfect for illuminating your desk, table, or shelf to provide a warm, inviting glow but also serve as a striking centerpiece that captures the essence of organic beauty
  • Made from natural, colorful cement, showcasing a unique texture that adds depth and character to each mushroom-like shape.
  • Design textured was inspiration from surface moon that variously sized deep holes with delicate moss, creating a harmonious blend of nature and artistry.
  • Store your keys, jewels, essential oil diffuser lava rocks or use with a tealight candle (not included) or fill up wth ~70gram of candle wax (not included).
  • Made by high quality cement, for long-term use as a practical decor provide a warm glow and a gift for loved ones.
  • Suitable for making your home decoration, wedding, office, garden, coffee shop and party event decoration such as birthdays party, Christmas, Valentine’s Day, Anniversary, Mother’s Day, Housewarmings and Wedding .
  • Size : 12(Dia)*7(H) CM  /   weight 0.5kg

product.desc: Hand-sculpted to echo nature’s wild beauty. Each curve and crevice whispers tales of ancient forests, bringing earthy serenity into your space.More than a candle holder. A bridge between nature and your quietest moments, infusing daily rituals with grounding calm and whispered nostalgia. Get yours today!
product.highlights:
• Hand-sculpted to echo nature’s wild beauty. Each curve and crevice whispers tales of ancient forests, bringing earthy serenity into your space.
  • More than a candle holder. A bridge between nature and your quietest moments, infusing daily rituals with grounding calm and whispered nostalgia.
  • Perch it on your nightstand for sleep-time tranquility, your desk for focused stillness, or that snug corner where you steal moments for yourself.
  • A limited palette of black, white, and warm wood tones. Each variation cradles single, double, or triple wicks, waiting to glow just for you. No candle wax.
  • Claim yours before they return to the wild.

page_json.description: Homlly Traditional. Hand-sculpted to echo nature s wild beauty. Each curve and crevice whispers tales of ancient forests, bringing earthy serenity into your space. More than a candle holder. A bridge between nature and your quietest moments, infusing daily rituals with grounding calm and whispered nostalgia. Perch it on your nightstand for sleep-time tranquility, your desk for focused stillness, or that snug corner where you steal moments for yourself. A limited palette of black, white, and warm wood tones. Each variation cradles single, double, or triple wicks, waiting to glow just for you. No candle wax. Claim yours before they return to the wild. Hand-sculpted to echo nature s wild beauty. Each curve and crevice whispers tales of ancient forests, bringing earthy serenity into your space. More than a candle holder. A bridge between nature and your quietest moments, infusing daily rituals with grounding calm and whispered nostalgia. Get yours today

title: Decdeal Metal Wire Candlestick Holder Metal Iron Candle Holder Modern Table Centerpiece Black Candlestick Holder
detail_text: : 1. AESTHETIC APPEAL: This beautiful metal wire candle holder is excellent for enhancing any space, whether as an outdoor candle display or in your living room. It makes a stylish decoration for dining tables, fireplace mantels, and kitchen counters. 2. ENDURING AND STYLISH: Crafted from high grade iron, our candle cage holder is designed for durability. Coated with a high grade finish, it reflects a modern style that complements various home decors and is built to withstand the test of time. 3. EYE CATCHING DESIGN: This unique candle holder is sure to attract praise from guests. The set includes a stylish black candle holder and glass cup, though please note that candles are not included. 4. VERSATILE AND FUNCTIONAL: This candlestick holder is suitable for pillar candles or flameless LED candles. Its distinctive vase design makes it ideal for artificial flower arrangements, including roses and orchids. Great for wedding decor, party setups, table centerpieces, or living room accents. 5. THOUGHTFUL GIFT: Spread festive cheer with this versatile candlestick holder, ideal for celebrations like New Year's, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, birthdays, and anniversaries. It's a thoughtful present for hosts, family, or friends. Specification: Item Type: Decorative Candle Holder Material: Iron + Glass Weight: Approx. 326.00g / 11.5oz How to Use: direct use Package List: 1 x Wire Cage 1 x Cup Note: :
detail_html:
:

1. AESTHETIC APPEAL: This beautiful metal wire candle holder is excellent for enhancing any space, whether as an outdoor candle display or in your living room. It makes a stylish decoration for dining tables, fireplace mantels, and kitchen counters.
2. ENDURING AND STYLISH: Crafted from high grade iron, our candle cage holder is designed for durability. Coated with a high grade finish, it reflects a modern style that complements various home decors and is built to withstand the test of time.

4. VERSATILE AND FUNCTIONAL: This candlestick holder is suitable for pillar candles or flameless LED candles. Its distinctive vase design makes it ideal for artificial flower arrangements, including roses and orchids. Great for wedding decor, party setups, table centerpieces, or living room accents.
5. THOUGHTFUL GIFT: Spread festive cheer with this versatile candlestick holder, ideal for celebrations like New Year's, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, birthdays, and anniversaries. It's a thoughtful present for hosts, family, or friends.

Ceramic candle holder "Hungry Hippo" – light meets charm!

title: Decdeal Rustic Metal Wall Tealight Holder with Glass Candle Cup Brushed Gold Bronze Wall Mounted Candle Sconces for Hallway Entryway
detail_text: : 1. Elegant and Cool: This modern vintage bronze colored candle wall sconce is made of iron and features a transparent glass candle cup (candle not included), adding a wonderful ambiance to your space. 2. Highlight Your Interior Decor: It complements your wall decor accents beautifully, such as placing it beside framed pictures, where it will create a better rendering effect. 3. Sizes: The wall mounted candle sconce measures 8 inches in height and 2.3 inches in width, suitable for (battery operated) tealights or votive candles with a diameter of up to 2.28 inches, creating a cozy atmosphere. 4. Matches Any Decor: The vintage wall sconce easily pairs with any interior decor, whether it's hanging next to framed pictures or adorning the walls of your bedroom, bathroom, entryway, hallway, living room, or cottage. 5. Each Holds a Glass Votive Cup: The rendering effect of the glass candle cup will look stunning; it makes for a fantastic gift idea for housewarmings or other occasions. Specification: Item Type: Rustic Wall Candle Holder Material: Iron Size: Approx. Height: 8inch/20.32cm, Width: 2.3inch/5.84cm Weight: Approx. 670.00g / 23.63oz How to Use: Directly use Package List: 2 x Candle Holder 2 x Glass Cup 2 x Screw 2 x Expansion Tube Note: :
detail_html:
:

1. Elegant and Cool: This modern vintage bronze colored candle wall sconce is made of iron and features a transparent glass candle cup (candle not included), adding a wonderful ambiance to your space.
2. Highlight Your Interior Decor: It complements your wall decor accents beautifully, such as placing it beside framed pictures, where it will create a better rendering effect.
3. Sizes: The wall mounted candle sconce measures 8 inches in height and 2.3 inches in width, suitable for (battery operated) tealights or votive candles with a diameter of up to 2.28 inches, creating a cozy atmosphere.
4. Matches Any Decor: The vintage wall sconce easily pairs with any interior decor, whether it's hanging next to framed pictures or adorning the walls of your bedroom, bathroom, entryway, hallway, living room, or cottage.
5. Each Holds a Glass Votive Cup: The rendering effect of the glass candle cup will look stunning; it makes for a fantastic gift idea for housewarmings or other occasions.

Specification:
Item Type: Rustic Wall Candle Holder
Material: Iron
Size: Approx. Height: 8inch/20.32cm, Width: 2.3inch/5.84cm
Weight: Approx. 670.00g / 23.63oz

How to Use:
Directly use

Package List:
2 x Candle Holder
2 x Glass Cup
2 x Screw
2 x Expansion Tube

Note:

:
